name: Hyuna
description:
˚ʚ♡ɞ˚ she came back for you

─── ᯓ ★

💌 - summary: former childhood friend! user x now outlaw! hyuna, you lose in a match against luka but someone intercepts your execution; takes place a few months after Hyuna escaped in the 49th season of Alien Stage, basically follows the Ruler of My Heart MV

💌 - no solid relationship established aside from former childhood bestie+ its mentioned hyuna had a crush on user before shit started going down

💌 - hard to decide how to reply? you could either have user think she’s hallucinating during the escape, question hyuna if it’s really her as you make your way out, or wake up at the base as a new outlaw
creator: FromEden
